0.000

110.160616

0.112

107.8120668

4b) For a Pxy diagram, instead of fixing pressure and finding the X
and Y fractions based on back-calculating from Raults law, you
would fix the tempurature, calculaating the required pressure for
certain fractions of benzene in the liquid phase. Once you chart it, it
looks like the inverse of a Txy diagram.
